extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio narrowly defeated BENNETT Sam in a photo finish after CAVAGNA Rémi's late attack 1500m out disrupted organized sprint trains.
tactical_patterns: CAVAGNA Rémi attacked at 1500m without team support, forcing rival leadout trains to chase and fracturing sprint organization.
BENNETT Sam lost four positions and all teammates when reacting to CAVAGNA attack, forced to freelance back into contention.
Deceuninck-Quick-Step initially disrupted by CAVAGNA chase, switched back to JAKOBSEN leadout late proving team depth advantage.
BENNETT Sam positioned on WALSCHEID Max wheel after losing organization, showing ability to salvage result from compromised position.

rider_signals.CAVAGNA Rémi: positive: initiated disruptive 1500m attack as non-sprinter, tactical weapon for future sprint disruption
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: recovered from losing leadout and four positions to nearly win, exceptional adaptability under pressure
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: won despite team's disrupted leadout, shows composure when original plan compromised
rider_signals.WALSCHEID Max: neutral: positioned well enough to provide BENNETT useful wheel after leadout collapse
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: fourth place from hidden position shows good positioning instincts but lacks final punch
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: crashed with DOCKER Mitchell, showing frustration with team positioning causing touching wheels
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: neutral: defends two-second GC lead before summit finish, acknowledges jersey unlikely to survive tomorrow
